description_long: This is a pair of modern rectangular sunglasses with a sleek, minimalist design. The frame is thin and angular, featuring straight lines and sharp corners, giving it a contemporary urban appeal. The lenses are large, dark, and opaque, providing full coverage and a bold look. The temples are slender and straight, with a subtle curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is narrow and integrated smoothly into the frame, maintaining the overall streamlined appearance. No visible embellishments or logos are present, emphasizing the understated and functional style.
description: A sleek, rectangular pair of sunglasses with thin frames and dark, opaque lenses, designed for a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular lenses and thin, straight frame with a narrow bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender, straight temples and the thin profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lenses and the symmetrical alignment of the temples.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the temple and frame details seen in view 1.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thin, and angular frame with straight lines and sharp corners; full-rim design with a minimalist, streamlined structure and no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, opaque black tint with uniform coloration and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Narrow, integrated bridge with a straight, flat design seamlessly connecting the two lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a slight curve at the ends for comfort; no visible patterns or engravings.
